description: CompositionPurple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed collar, and flock and graphic print on chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print Is it one of those grey days where everything seems to be cheesing you off? Wear the warning with this Mr. Grumpy t-shirt from mr. men and get people to stay away from you, allowing you to bounce back in time with your happy spirit. A great casual wear, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
